'''J'Mikel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During his career, J'Mikel selected the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] [[Xiaan Amersu]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]; however he was struck down by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] before he could complete her [[Jedi training/Legends|training]].

==Biography==
[[File:JMikelDeath-SWREP28.jpg|thumb|left|200px|J'Mikel dies by Aurra Sing's hand.]]
Like most Jedi of the era, J'Mikel was most likely discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at birth and delivered to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]]. Studying at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]], J'Mikel eventually [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]] and was selected for training by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] for many years with his tutor, J'Mikel was eventually ready to face the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]. Passing, the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|knighted]] him, making him a full-fledged member of the Order.<ref name="SWR 27" />

As a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], J'Mikel was permitted to take on a student of his own. Selecting the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Xiaan Amersu]] from the academy, the pair began training together immediately. In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]], the pair was dispatched into the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]] with Knight [[Peerce]] to search for the [[Jedi hunter/Legends|Jedi hunter]], [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]]. After trailing the ex-Jedi for some time, the group discovered a slain squad of [[Republic Peace Officer]]s; obviously Sing's handiwork. Splitting up, J'Mikel eventually stumbled upon Peerce's dead body just as Sing leapt from the shadows and [[Duel on Coruscant (30 BBY)|attacked]]. After a brief [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]], J'Mikel was outmatched and impaled by the hunter's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Taking the Anx's lightsaber as a souvenir, Sing left Amersu alive for a future hunt.<ref name="SWR 27" />

==Legacy==
[[File:Xiaan-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Xiaan Amersu contemplating J'Mikel's corpse.]]
With J'Mikel's death, Xiaan Amersu was reassigned to another Master with hardened resolve and a strong desire to become a Knight so that she could confront her Master's murderer. Over a decade after the Anx Jedi was slain, Amersu had indeed become a Knight and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Before leading her first solo mission, Amersu was hailed by fellow Twi'lek Knight [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] who had dueled Sing and retrieved J'Mikel's lightsaber. Giving Amersu the lost weapon, Secura closed the circle between Master and apprentice which Sing had once broken.<ref name="Jedi: Aayla Secura">''[[Jedi: Aayla Secura]]''</ref>
